title: BreweryRecipesAddon
description: Finally, a recipe addon for BreweryX!
body:
This is a BreweryX addon, not a plugin!




This BreweryX addon allows players to discover recipes in lootchests and view their collected recipes within their recipe book!



You can edit the recipe book gui within this addons config at /plugins/BreweryX/addons/Recipes! All recipes a player collects are saved via permissions! This plugin supports ANY permission plugin as long as you can execute a command to set a permission on a player! It also natively supports LuckPerms as a permission manager so commands don't have to be executed if you're using it!



Edit the gui, recipe book, and recipes via the config!
